style_effects: Subtle heat haze curls around Jigglypuff's steel joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its seam lines, while metallic dust particles drift in slow, precise arcs. A cool cyan aura radiates outward in concentric waves, casting sharp, geometric shadows under a sterile white-blue lighting mood. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
